LeadMetadata.description: Tracking and integration data stored under `metadata`. Known keys are documented here, and additional metadata keys are also allowed.

ad_id.description: Individual ad creative ID. Meta: from `ad_id` param. Google: normalized from `creative`.

ad_platform.description: Ad platform that sourced this lead. Derived from URL attribution params at capture time.

adset_id.description: Ad set/group ID. Meta: from `adset_id` param. Google: normalized from `adgroupid`.

campaign_id.description: Ad platform campaign ID. Meta: from `campaign_id` param. Google: normalized from `campaignid`.

device.description: Device type of the click (Google `device` ValueTrack param: m=mobile, t=tablet, c=computer)

event_source_url.description: Page URL where the lead was captured

fbc.description: Meta click ID from the `_fbc` cookie or `fbclid`

fbp.description: Meta browser ID from the `_fbp` cookie

ga_client_id.description: GA4 client ID extracted from the `_ga` cookie

gcl_aw.description: Google Ads Conversion Linker value from the `_gcl_aw` cookie

keyword.description: Search keyword that triggered the ad (Google `keyword` ValueTrack param)

matchtype.description: Keyword match type (Google `matchtype` ValueTrack param: e=exact, p=phrase, b=broad)

network.description: Google network type (Google `network` ValueTrack param: g=search, s=partner, d=display)

ph_distinct_id.description: PostHog distinct ID from `posthog.get_distinct_id()`. Internal — stripped from API responses.

ph_session_id.description: PostHog session ID from `posthog.get_session_id()`. Internal — stripped from API responses.

placement.description: Ad placement surface (Meta `placement` param, e.g. feed, story, reels)

site_source_name.description: Source platform shortname (Meta `site_source_name` param, e.g. fb, ig, an)

ttp.description: TikTok browser ID from the `_ttp` cookie

info.description:
LeadRouter API for lead routing operations.

## Authentication
All API endpoints require authentication using API keys.

### API Key Types
- **Public Keys** (`pk_...`): Read-only access
- **Private Keys** (`sk_...`): Full read/write access

### How to Authenticate
1. Log in to your account and create an API key
2. Click the "Authorize" button in Swagger UI
3. Enter your API key: `Bearer <your_api_key>`

All requests must include the `Authorization` header.

### Multi-tenant Access
API keys are scoped to your membership in a specific account.
To access multiple accounts, create separate API keys for each.
info.title: LeadRouter API

delete.description: Releases a tracking number back to Telnyx and marks it as released.

patch.description: Assigns or clears call_flow_id on an active buyer-delivery tracking number. Campaign-intake numbers are not reachable on this buyer-scoped route.
patch.summary: Update tracking number call flow binding

get.description: Returns an active questionnaire in an active campaign. No authentication required.
get.summary: Get active questionnaire by campaign and slug

put.description: Replaces the global tag set for a lead. Requires write access.

patch.description: Updates lead data. JSONB fields (metadata, data) are merged with existing values.

422.description: Validation error or lead already qualified

get.description: Returns all tags for the account, ordered alphabetically. Useful for autocomplete.
Returns all site configurations for an account. No authentication required.
get.summary: List site configs for an account

post.description: Creates a site configuration for the current account. Requires write access.

get.description: Returns the current pool health status for a buyer.
Returns canonical US states ordered by display name. No authentication required.
Lists return records for an account with optional filters.

post.description: Creates a pending return request for a distribution.
Sends an SMS verification code to the lead's phone number via Telnyx Verify.

get.description: Returns recent click events for a tracked link.

post.description: Creates a new lead in draft status for the account resolved from the request host. Returns a JWT token for subsequent operations.

get.description: Exports account-scoped leads as CSV using the same filters as the leads list endpoint.

post.description: Merges data into a draft lead and evaluates the questionnaire's disqualification rules. If a rule matches, the lead is disqualified and a message is returned. If no rule matches, the lead data is updated and the funnel continues.

422.description: Lead must be in draft status

post.summary: Check a lead against disqualification rules

post.description: Records prior express written consent on a qualified lead for the account resolved from the request host and releases pending distributions to buyers.

422.description: Lead not qualified or invalid proof

post.summary: Confirm consent for a qualified lead

post.description: Cancels a paused or active order, refunding credits for unfulfilled leads.
Verifies the SMS code submitted by the user and marks the lead's phone as verified.

delete.description: Deletes a site configuration by slug for the current account. Requires write access.

get.description: Returns a site configuration by slug. No authentication required.

patch.description: Updates a site configuration by slug for the current account. Requires write access.

get.description: Returns a questionnaire by its slug. Only active questionnaires are returned. No authentication required.

patch.description: Updates an existing questionnaire by slug. Requires write access.

get.description: Lists all tracking numbers for a buyer, ordered newest first.

post.description: Provisions a new Telnyx tracking number and assigns it to the buyer. The buyer must have a phone number set and must not already have an active tracking number.

409.description: Buyer already has an active tracking number

get.description: Lists all orders for a buyer, optionally filtered by status.

post.description: Creates a new order for a buyer. Orders start in paused status.

get.description: Lists all questionnaires for an account. Requires authentication.

parameters.description: Filter by tags. Comma-separated = AND (must have all), pipe-separated = OR (must have any). Example: 'hvac,residential' or 'hvac|commercial'
parameters.name: tags

post.description: Creates a new questionnaire for an account. Requires write access.
Uploads an image or PDF for a file question on an existing draft lead. Requires lead JWT auth.

get.description: Lists all buyers for the given account, ordered by name.

post.description: Creates a new buyer within the account.
Uploads an image or PDF for a file question on an existing draft lead. Requires lead JWT auth.

get.description: Lists all user memberships for the account with their buyer associations.

post.description: Invites a user by email. Creates the user if not found. Optionally associates with a buyer.
post.summary: Add a user to the account

get.description: Searches canonical cities by city or alias prefix within a required state. No authentication required.

post.description: Approves a pending return. Triggers credit refund and order count adjustment.

get.description: Returns the JSON Schema that defines the valid structure for questionnaire questions. Publicly cacheable.
Returns a single buyer by ID.

patch.description: Updates a buyer's name and/or status.

get.description: Returns the admin questionnaire detail response for any questionnaire status. Requires authentication.

post.description: Runs qualification on a draft lead for the account resolved from the request host, distributes to a matching contractor, and returns matched buyer data.

422.description: Lead must be in draft status

get.description: Returns a landing page by its slug with resolved questionnaire and campaign slugs. No authentication required.

parameters.description: Optional site slug to disambiguate duplicate landing page slugs
parameters.name: site_slug

get.description: Returns non-released tracking numbers in the current account that reference the call flow.

post.description: Validates a call flow definition without persisting it. Read access is sufficient. Optional routing_mode checks buyer-delivery or campaign-intake compatibility.
Verifies the SMS code submitted by the user and marks the host-resolved account lead's phone as verified.

Merges data into a draft lead for the account resolved from the request host and evaluates the questionnaire's disqualification rules. If a rule matches, the lead is disqualified and a message is returned. If no rule matches, the lead data is updated and the funnel continues.

422.description: Lead must be in draft status

post.summary: Check a lead against disqualification rules

get.description: Returns current daily/weekly/monthly lead cap usage for a buyer.
Returns a campaign and its questionnaires. Requires authentication.

patch.description: Updates a campaign by slug. Requires write access.

post.description: Runs qualification on a draft lead, distributes to a matching contractor, and returns matched buyer data.

422.description: Lead must be in draft status

get.description: Returns the canonical JSON Schema for validating call-flow definitions. Publicly cacheable.
Returns qualified leads that have no distribution records — i.e., leads that qualified but never matched to an order.

parameters.description: Filter by distribution outcome (no_active_orders, no_criteria_match, no_vertical_match, no_routing_match, no_inbound_eligible_buyers, transient_distribution_error)
parameters.name: outcome

parameters.description: Only include leads unmatched for at least this many minutes
parameters.name: min_unmatched_age_minutes

parameters.description: When true, includes grouped counts by outcome and age bucket
parameters.name: include_counts

post.description: Sends an SMS verification code to the lead's phone number via Telnyx Verify for the account resolved from the request host.

get.description: Lists all call flows for the current account. Pagination query parameters are not supported.

post.description: Creates a new call flow for the current account. Requires write access.

get.description: Lists active tracked links for the current account.

post.description: Creates a tracked link for the current account. Requires write access.

get.description: Lists distribution records for an account. Optionally filter by buyer_id and/or order_id.

delete.description: Deletes a call flow by ID. Requires write access.

get.description: Returns a single call flow by ID for the current account.

patch.description: Updates an existing call flow by ID. V1 treats PATCH as a full-resource update and requires both `name` and `definition`.

get.description: Lists leads for an account with optional filters. Requires API key auth.

post.description: Creates a new lead in draft status. Returns a JWT token for subsequent operations.

get.description: Returns a single order by ID.

patch.description: Updates an order's quantity and/or criteria. Only allowed when paused.

422.description: Validation error or order not paused

get.description: Lists campaigns for the account. Requires authentication.

post.description: Creates a new campaign. Requires write access.
Rejects a pending return. Optionally includes review notes.
Transitions a paused order to active, making it eligible for lead distribution.

get.description: Exports leads scoped to a single buyer as CSV, using the same filtering semantics as scoped lead views.

post.description: Starts a GoodAudit session recording for an external embed using the GoodLeads-hosted recording endpoint. Requires a lead JWT in the Authorization header and an allowed Origin.
Transitions an active order to paused, stopping lead distribution.
Records prior express written consent on a qualified lead and releases pending distributions to buyers.

422.description: Lead not qualified or invalid proof

post.summary: Confirm consent for a qualified lead

post.description: Completes a hosted external recording using a body-carried completion token. The same JSON body is accepted as text/plain for navigator.sendBeacon compatibility.
Initializes a tracking number pool for a buyer. Provisions pool_min numbers and enables pool mode. For V1→pool upgrades, existing numbers count toward pool_min.

get.description: Returns a single distribution record by ID with nested lead and order summaries.
Returns all landing pages for an account with resolved questionnaire and campaign slugs. No authentication required.

parameters.description: Optional site slug to scope results
parameters.name: site_slug

get.summary: List landing pages for an account

post.description: Creates a landing page for the current account. Requires write access.

delete.description: Archives a tracked link for the current account. Requires write access.

get.description: Returns a single tracked link by ID for the current account.

patch.description: Updates a tracked link for the current account. Requires write access.

delete.description: Deletes a landing page by ID for the current account. Requires write access.

patch.description: Updates a landing page by ID for the current account. Requires write access.
Updates lead data for the account resolved from the request host. JSONB fields (metadata, data) are merged with existing values.

422.description: Validation error or lead already qualified

delete.description: Removes a user's membership from the account.
delete.summary: Remove a member from the account

get.description: Returns a single account member by membership ID.

patch.description: Updates a member's role and/or profile fields (email, phone). All fields optional.
